taskButtons.tasks.name: git-clean-gone-branches
taskButtons.tasks.script: if ((git branch --show-current) -ne 'master') { git switch master }; git fetch --prune; $branches = git for-each-ref --format='%(refname:short)%09%(upstream:track)' refs/heads | ForEach-Object { $parts = $_ -split "`t", 2; if ($parts.Count -lt 2) { return }; [pscustomobject]@{ Branch = $parts[0].Trim(); Track = $parts[1].Trim() } } | Where-Object { $_.Track -eq '[gone]' -and $_.Branch -ne 'master' }; foreach ($branch in $branches) { git branch -d $branch.Branch }

taskButtons.buttons.name: Git cleanup
taskButtons.buttons.tooltip: Switch to master, fetch --prune, delete branches with gone upstream
